storage.title: Shrink Video Files with VideoCompressorPro
storage.desc: Large video files can quickly take up room on your device or in cloud storage. Our Video Compressor help you shrink video files easily, keeping your library organized and making everyday storage effortless across desktop and mobile devices.

discord.title: VideoCompressorPro for Discord
discord.desc: Discord has strict upload limits for non-Nitro users. Use our high-performance VideoCompressorPro to compress video for Discord (under 25MB) and make sharing in chats, communities, and team spaces easier than ever.

visualizer.title: The Best Way to use VideoCompressorPro

how_it_works.title: How Our Video Compressor Works
how_it_works.desc: Reduce video size in three simple steps with our high-speed online workflow.

steps.title: How to Compress Video Online
steps.01_desc: Select the video you want to shrink from your device. Our Video Compressor supports all major formats like MP4, MOV, and AVI for fast processing.
steps.02_desc: Select a mode to reduce video size: Basic for speed, Strong for balance, or Extreme to compress video files by up to 90% without quality loss.
steps.03_desc: Once our online video compressor finishes its work, download your smaller file instantly. No waiting, no uploads, and 100% privacy guaranteed.

reviews.title: Loved by over 50M+ users
reviews.desc: From large 4K files to daily social media content, professionals trust VideoCompress to shrink their videos quickly and securely.
reviews.r1_text: VideoCompress has revolutionized our video processing workflow. We can now compress 4K videos online into much more manageable sizes without losing quality. Our team productivity has increased by 60%.
reviews.r2_text: As a marketing team, we deal with tons of video content every day. The tool helps us compress videos for social media while keeping the quality crystal clear. Upload times have improved massively.
reviews.r3_text: I upload daily vlogs and the raw files are huge. This is the best free video compressor I've found. It shrinks my 5GB files down to under 500MB, and my subscribers can't even tell the difference.
reviews.r4_text: Privacy was my biggest concern with online tools. Finding out that this runs entirely locally in the browser was a game-changer. I can compress client wedding videos without risking data leaks.
reviews.r5_text: Getting videos under the 25MB Discord limit used to be a nightmare. Now I just drop them in here on the 'Extreme' setting and they are perfectly sized for sharing in my server.
reviews.r6_text: I have to host hundreds of video lectures. Compressing them here first saves me hundreds of dollars in AWS hosting fees every month. It's incredibly fast and easy to use.
reviews.r7_text: For web optimization, having small video backgrounds is crucial. This compressor gives me the exact control I need over file size to keep my core web vitals in the green.
reviews.r8_text: The interface is so clean and premium. It feels like a paid Apple app but it's completely free. I use it every single day to prep videos for TikTok and Instagram Reels.
reviews.r9_text: Managing a high-volume studio requires reliable tools. This is our go-to for quick compression before client previews.
reviews.r10_text: I was skeptical about browser-based tools, but the speed and quality here are better than most desktop software I've used.
reviews.r11_text: The fastest way to compress video online without any quality loss. I use it for my daily social media uploads and it works perfectly.
reviews.r12_text: I love that it works entirely in my browser. Privacy is key for me, and this is the only tool I trust with my sensitive recordings.

why_choose.title: A Private and Secure Video Compressor
why_choose.desc: Unlike other tools that upload your videos to remote servers, our platform is a privacy-first Video Compressor that uses cutting-edge WebAssembly (WASM) technology to reduce video size entirely within your browser.
why_choose.point1: No file size limits for basic compression
why_choose.point2: Your videos never touch our servers

formats_sec.title: Supports 30+ Video Formats
formats_sec.desc: Whatever format your video is in, we handle it.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about our Video Compressor
faq.a1: Yes! Our core video compression tool is 100% free with no limits. All processing happens in your browser using WebAssembly, so there are zero server costs passed on to you.
faq.q2: Is my video safe and private?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Your video files are never uploaded to any server. All compression happens locally inside your browser using FFmpeg WebAssembly. We never see, store, or have access to your files.
faq.a3: We support over 30 video formats including MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WEBM, WMV, FLV, 3GP, and many more. Output is always delivered as optimized MP4.
faq.q4: How much can I compress a video?
faq.a4: Results vary by content, but our Extreme mode can reduce file sizes by up to 90%. A 100MB video can become as small as 10MB. You choose between Basic (fastest), Strong (balanced), and Extreme (smallest size) modes.
faq.a5: We use industry-standard H.264 encoding with carefully tuned CRF values. Basic mode is virtually lossless to the human eye. Strong and Extreme modes reduce quality slightly in exchange for much smaller file sizes.
faq.q6: What is the maximum file size?
faq.a6: There is no hard limit. However, since processing happens in your browser, very large files (over 2GB) may be slow or require a powerful computer. For best results, we recommend files under 2GB.

cta.title: Ready to Compress Video Online?
cta.desc: Join millions of users who trust our Video Compressor to reduce video size without losing quality. Fast, free, and secure.

footer.desc: The world's fastest and most private online video compressor. Powered by WebAssembly.

cutter_page.q2: Will trimming affect my video quality?

cutter_page.a3: Since processing happens locally, it depends on your RAM. Most modern computers can easily handle videos up to 2GB.

about_page.hero_subtitle: We believe that you shouldn't have to sacrifice your personal data just to shrink a video file. That's why we built a tool that works entirely on your device.
about_page.story_p1: In 2024, our founders noticed a disturbing trend: most "free" online video tools were actually data harvesting machines. To compress a simple video, you had to upload it to a server you didn't control, wait in a queue, and hope your private content was safe.
about_page.story_p2: We decided to change that. By leveraging modern browser technology like WebAssembly, we created a platform that delivers professional-grade video processing without ever asking for your data.
about_page.v1_desc: Zero uploads. Your files stay on your device, exactly where they belong.
about_page.v2_desc: Local processing means no upload or download queues. Instant results.
about_page.v3_desc: Professional video tools should be accessible to everyone, without hidden costs.
